title: ConvertKit vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits creators, businesses, and SMS needs.
h1: ConvertKit vs Sendinblue: Detailed Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: ConvertKit and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators and course sellers, while Sendinblue excels as an all-in-one CRM with SMS and transactional email capabilities. This guide helps you choose based on your specific needs.
choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or course seller focused on audience monetization
You need built-in landing pages and commerce features to sell products
You prefer an intuitive platform specifically designed for creators with visual automation
choose_b_if: You need SMS and WhatsApp messaging alongside email marketing
You want the largest free tier (100,000 subscribers) for scaling without cost
You require a full CRM suite with transactional email API and live chat support

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ConvertKit is better for creators and course sellers needing landing pages and commerce tools, while Sendinblue excels for businesses needing SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, and transactional email capabilities. Both have strong reputations, but serve different use cases.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better value with a larger free tier (100,000 vs 1,000 subscribers) and lower starting paid price ($25 vs $29). However, ConvertKit's pricing includes creator-specific features like landing pages and commerce that Sendinblue charges extra for.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support CSV import/export of subscriber lists, making migration straightforward. Most email marketers can export their contacts from Sendinblue and import them into ConvertKit without losing data, though you may need to rebuild automation sequences.
